conditions.analyte_polymer: Ls-PS (linear polystyrene with saturated DPE end-groups)
conditions.detector: light scattering detector and UV absorption detector
conditions.evidence_text: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm) smaller than the preparative fractionation. The eluent was CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v) at a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min. The column temperature was varied to achieve CAP condition for the polymers of interest. TCAP and tE,CAP of Ls-PS... are measured as 14.8 °C/7.4 min
conditions.notes: Ls-PS refers to linear PS with saturated end-groups recovered from ring purification.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, The University of Memphis, Memphis, Tennessee 38154, United States; Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Korea

conditions.analyte_polymer: Lu-PS (linear polystyrene with unsaturated DPE end-groups)
conditions.detector: light scattering detector and UV absorption detector
conditions.evidence_text: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm)... The eluent was CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v) at a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min. The column temperature was varied to achieve CAP condition... TCAP and tE,CAP of... Lu-PS... are measured as 14.95 °C/7.6 min
conditions.notes: Lu-PS refers to linear PS precursors with unsaturated reactive end groups.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry, The University of Memphis, Memphis, Tennessee 38154, United States; Division of Advanced Materials Science and Department of Chemistry, Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH), Pohang 37673, Korea

conditions.detector: light scattering detector and UV absorption detector
conditions.evidence_text: Analytical LCCC analysis used a column (Nucleosil C18, 250 × 4.6 mm, 100 Å, 5 μm)... The eluent was CH2Cl2/CH3CN (58/42, v/v) at a flow rate of 0.5 mL/min. The column temperature was varied to achieve CAP condition... TCAP and tE,CAP of... Ring-PS... are measured as 17.3 °C/ 8.23 min
conditions.notes: Ring-PS refers to cyclic polystyrene unimers fractionated from the cyclization product.
